_doc: KARTA projektu drapek v2 = jedyne zrodlo prawdy. Archetyp gadzet-handsPOV z ANIMAL-AS-PERFORMER (pies = odpowiednik twarzy: kanoniczny dog-ref warunkuje wszystkie sceny z psem, jak face-ref w beauty). Produkt: Drapek — deska do scierania pazurow psa z WSUWANA pokrywa na smakolyki (Ali white-label). Tozsamosc WYLACZNIE z gallery_curated; marka PetSpany ze wzorca = forbidden. v2: dodane elements[] (rubryka wiernosci 0i), packshots{}, mechanism_states{} — po feedbacku Tomka 'tylko jedna scena pokazuje jak dziala produkt'.

product.anatomy_str: A flat rectangular dog claw-filing board, about 35 by 25 cm and only 3 cm thin (a thin slab, NOT a thick wedge), with a solid pale natural pine-wood body and plain blonde wooden edges; the entire top face is covered in one single continuous coarse matte-black grippy abrasive scratch pad with a fine sandpaper/emery texture; at ONE END a small square treat compartment (a pale wooden well recessed INTO the body) is closed by a thin sliding lid whose TOP is also coarse black and sits FLUSH, level and in-plane with the rest of the black top (it is a flush sliding cover, NOT a raised wooden frame and NOT a panel resting on top); the lid opens by pulling a short black fabric pull-loop at its corner, sliding the lid HORIZONTALLY sideways out beyond the board outline, which uncovers the pale wooden well holding a few brown kibble treats; the blonde wood edges are completely plain and UNBRANDED with no text or logo
product.functional_count: exactly 1 flat thin board with 1 continuous coarse black abrasive top + 1 flush black-topped sliding lid at one end carrying 1 black fabric pull-loop + 1 pale wooden treat well recessed at that same end - this exact set, identical in every scene, never more, never fewer
product.exactly_one: EXACTLY ONE scratch board in the scene and only ONE dog; a human hand appears only when the action needs it and holds only that one thing (metal clippers OR the black pull-loop OR nothing)
product._cv_reason: produkt = czarna powierzchnia scierna + jasne drewno (neutralny/czarny, maska HSV bezuzyteczna); pies tan/bialy koliduje z drewnem i skora dloni. Licznik egzemplarzy = VLM wiersz-na-klatke.
forbidden_leaks: PetSpany wordmark on the wood edge
any brand name or logo on the wood or board
grey patterned carpet from the reference
raised wooden frame on top of the black surface
compartment box sitting on top of the pad
treat well in the middle of the board
elements: korpus_deski: solid pale natural pine body, a THIN 3 cm slab (NOT a thick wedge/klin), plain blonde edges, lying flat and level on the floor plane
czarna_powierzchnia: ONE single continuous coarse matte-black abrasive scratch pad covering the ENTIRE top face (one uninterrupted surface, not split panels)

pokrywa_flush_z_konca: a thin sliding lid at ONE END whose black top is FLUSH and in-plane with the rest of the black surface (a flush sliding cover) - NOT a raised wooden frame, NOT a box/panel sitting on top of the pad
petla: one short black fabric pull-loop at the corner of the sliding lid
wneka_przy_koncu: a pale wooden treat well recessed INTO the body at the SAME end as the lid (revealed only when the lid is slid out), positioned at the end - NOT in the middle of the board
smakolyki: a few brown kibble cube treats resting inside the pale wooden well (visible only when open)
bez_marki: blonde wood edges completely plain and unbranded, zero text, logo or wordmark anywhere

packshots._doc: kotwice prawdy do kompozytow side-by-side i identity_board (0i). closed = pokrywa flush zamknieta (szew+petla); open = pokrywa wysunieta w bok + wneka; lifestyle = realny wysuw z karma (JEDYNY obraz dzialania).

mechanism_states._doc: PASZPORT MECHANIZMU: obraz-ref per STAN. Kazda generacja klatki dostaje ref WLASCIWEGO stanu; last() ZAWSZE dostaje [first, ref_stanu]. mech-open wyciety z lifestyle-demo (realny wysuw z karma).

scenography.layout: one canonical bright airy home living-room floor: warm light-oak wood flooring or a soft cream/beige low-pile rug, a light neutral (cream/beige) sofa softly blurred in the background, tidy and clean; the scratch board lies FLAT and level on the floor in the front-center of frame with the treat lid always at its LEFT end
scenography.swiatlo: bright natural daytime window light, warm and clean, high-key, soft gentle shadows, cheerful cozy home mood - deliberately NOT the dark reference room

action_steps: a hand brings shiny metal nail clippers toward the dog's front paw; the dog pulls its paw back and turns its head away with ears pinned back (anxiety)
a hand sets the flat thin scratch board down level on the floor in front of the curious dog, lid flush-closed
a hand pulls the black loop and the flush black lid slides HORIZONTALLY sideways out beyond the board outline, uncovering the pale wooden well with brown kibble at the end
the dog drags a front paw DOWN and back across the coarse black abrasive top, claws scratching, leaving fine pale-grey scuff streaks, while the uncovered well with kibble sits at the end
the dog dips its nose into the open well and takes a treat
the dog rests a front paw calmly on the scratched board beside the open well
grammar.both_hands: only ONE human hand appears at a time and only in the clipper / board-placing / lid-sliding scenes; in the scratch and treat-eating scenes there is NO human hand in frame, only the dog; the dog scratches with its FRONT paws only (alternating), front legs on the board, hind legs on the floor
grammar.physics: the board lies FLAT and level on the floor plane (a thin 3 cm slab, never a steep wedge); the dog scratches with real canine paw mechanics - a front paw drags down and back across the flat black abrasive top, claws contacting the surface; the sliding lid moves HORIZONTALLY within the board plane, sliding sideways out beyond the outline, and never lifts, floats or tilts up; the uncovered well is a recess in the body at the end; treats rest in the wooden well under gravity; the dog always has exactly four legs, four paws, one tail, two ears - never an extra limb or paw; clippers are gripped by human fingers, never floating; no full 360 spins, rigid board stays sharp

identity.dog_desc: one canonical tri-color Pembroke Welsh Corgi: tan/fawn face and legs, white chest, blaze and paws, a black saddle over the back, large upright pointed ears, short legs, fox-like face, dark friendly eyes, black nose, no collar - THE SAME individual dog in every scene

screens_and_text: no readable text, logos, brand names, wordmarks or captions anywhere; the blonde wood edge is plain with NO wordmark (scrub PetSpany); the treat well contains only plain brown kibble; wide illegible small text is fine, any legible glyph = reject
